message:
fix: cm onboard status now reports correct conversation/message counts

Replace hardcoded zero values for totalConversations and totalMessages
with actual counts queried from cassTimeline. The previous implementation
left these as 0 with a comment saying there was no reliable way to get
counts, but cassTimeline (used by privacy and audit commands) provides
exactly this data. Also fixes onboardingRatio which was always 0.

Closes #33

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
